title: Publications | Stats NZ
content:
## Making the census test count
Hamilton residents are being asked to help make sure updated census methodology works by participating in the census test.

## Developing 2023 Census products and services – feedback
Consultation closed on 1 April 2021. We asked for feedback about your experience with 2018 Census products and services to inform development of products and services for 2023 Census.

## Summary of Gateway review 0,4 of 2023 Census programme
2023 Census Gateway review 0,4 provides assurance to Stats NZ on whether the 2023 Census programme service is robust before delivery.

## Independent quality assurance review 2
The second independent quality assurance review assessed the 2023 Census Programme's High Level Design and programme structure and management environment.

## Updated census collection model to be tested in 2021
A test of the updated census collection model is scheduled to run on 9 March 2021.

## Preliminary view of 2023 Census content
Read Stats NZ's view of the content we plan to collect in the 2023 Census of Population and Dwellings.

## Funding and delivering the next census: 2023 Census of Population and Dwellings
Business case and detailed management case for New Zealand's next census, 2023 Census. Both documents should be read together.

## Stats NZ welcomes new advisory board
A new governance advisory board is to be established for Stats NZ, and Stats NZ has received funding from Budget 2020 to run the next census in 2023.
